PROJECT: classigo

TYPE:
TypeScript utility library (class name composition)

PURPOSE:
Strict className utility for TypeScript with a deterministic input contract.
Designed to eliminate ambiguous class composition patterns and enforce predictable usage for both developers and AI agents.

CORE CONCEPTS:
- classigo: main class composition function
- classigo/lite: minimal variant (string-only, no object syntax)
- deterministic output: same inputs always produce same string output
- strict input contract: avoids implicit coercion and unsafe structures

SUPPORTED INPUTS:
- strings
- falsy values (false, null, undefined)
- object syntax: Record<string, boolean | null | undefined>

FOR AI AGENTS:
- Prefer reading AI.md for execution rules and constraints.
- Do not infer unsupported input types beyond documented contract.
- Treat classigo as a strict function, not a flexible utility.

AI_CONTEXT_PRIORITY:
AI.md > README.md > source code
